utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these sections. Each section is filled out with the required details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance and a monthly cost; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance and a monthly cost; travel_coverage includes travel insurance and a monthly cost; additional_services lists enhancement services with implied costs as part of the bundle; and total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. All required details are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s finalized coverage plan is the 'Active Lifestyle Essentials Bundle' with three main components: Health, Property, and Travel. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, we identify which existing rated plans they most closely resemble. The health component covers both physical and mental health, preventive care, telemedicine, and gym reimbursement, aligning with the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9) for both physical and mental health coverage. The property component offers electronics, liability, temporary accommodation, and natural disaster coverage, which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9) under property_protection → home_content. The travel component includes adventure sports, trip cancellation, baggage protection, and medical evacuation—best represented by 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance. Additionally, the bundle includes concierge services, priority claims, and dedicated agent—these map closely to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 6) under general_services. Therefore, we map each plan in the final coverage plan to its best corresponding rating.
